blocks.title: ADDITIONAL INFORMATION ON REVERSIBILITY
blocks.content:
13 TECHNICAL INFORMATION FOR

SCENARIO DEVELOPMENT /

APPLICATION UNIT

The information in this EPD is given for one specific fire damper with motorised actuator, produced by Rf-Technologies in

its factory at Oosterzele, Belgium.

The ratio between application unit and reference flow in the EPD equals 1 (same unit in application unit as in EPD).

The fire dampers are designed and installedwhere air ducts penetrate fire-resistant compartment wallsin order to restore

the fire resistance grade of the penetrated wall and to prevent smoke propagation.

Installation can be donein different varieties, in respect with the Declaration of Performance (DoP)of the product:

• Installation in a rigid wall and floor;

• Installation in flexible wall (metal stud gypsum plasterboard wall);

• Installation in flexible wall (metal stud gypsum plasterboard wall), sealing with gypsum;

• Installation in flexible wall (metal stud gypsum plasterboard wall), sealing withmortar;

• Installation in shaft wall, sealing with gypsum;

• Installation in shaft wall, sealing with rigid rock wool boards with coating;

• Installation in shaft wall with IFW installation kit and plaster joint filler;

• Installation in flexible and rigid wall, sealing with rigid rock wool boards with coating;

• Installation in rigid floor, sealing with rigid rock wool boards with coating;

• Installation remote from the wall, sealing and insulation with rigid rock wool boards with coating;

• Installation remote from the wall + GEOFLAM plates (threaded rods and U-shaped steel profiles).

For each scenario, different materials and processes may be necessary in order to install the product.Details on the

installation procedures can be found on the website of the producer through the following link:Optimised rectangular fire

damper up to 120’ (rft.eu)

The reversibility of the here consideredCU-LT 200x100 fire damper with motorised actuatorstrongly depends on the type of installation(see chapter 13).Considering the rather large variety in

application, in the following table, a general qualitative description of reversibility is given for all different applications together.
